title: DisarmTripwire
description: Brings back the tripwire disarm feature to forge. Left click any tripwire with shears to disarm it, just like in vanilla.
body:
# DisarmTripwire
[https://github.com/ton185/DisarmTripwire](https://github.com/ton185/DisarmTripwire)
## What?
Forge disabled the ability to disarm tripwire by left-clicking it with shears. This mod brings that ability back.

## How?
It's very simple, the actual logic for disarmed tripwire is still in the game, so all I have to do is add an event handler to disarm the tripwire when left-clicking with shears.

# If you want me to port this mod to another version of forge/neoforge then make an issue.
